frame_analyses.description: FLS setup visible with Penrose drain on suture block, instruments entering field
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean setup, trainee preparing to begin task

frame_analyses.description: Needle holder visible with suture, beginning to load needle for suture placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instruments positioned appropriately, needle loading appears controlled

frame_analyses.description: Needle being driven through first mark on Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle angle and positioning through drain tissue

frame_analyses.description: Continuing to pass suture through drain, working toward second mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady progression through suture placement phase

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw of surgeon's knot, instruments crossing to create loops
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Starting knot formation, appears to be creating double throw

frame_analyses.description: Video annotation confirms 'Double throw with flat knot' - completing surgeon's knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper surgeon's knot technique being executed

frame_analyses.description: Tightening first throw, surgeon's knot being secured
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tensioning of surgeon's knot, appears secure

frame_analyses.description: Beginning second throw, switching hands as required
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switching visible, proper technique for second throw

frame_analyses.description: Completing second throw with single pass
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean single throw execution, good hand coordination

frame_analyses.description: Beginning third throw, again switching hands
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching maintained for third throw

frame_analyses.description: Beginning to cut suture ends with scissors
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Positioning scissors to cut both suture tails

frame_analyses.description: Final frame showing completed knot, timer shows 02:57:04
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed, knot appears intact and secure

knot_assessments.notes: Properly executed surgeon's knot with double throw confirmed by video annotation
Clean single throw with proper hand switching
Final single throw completing the knot sequence with hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain appears well approximated with no visible gaps in the slit

technique_summary: Solid performance with proper surgeon's knot and appropriate hand switching between throws. Completion time slightly longer than optimal but technique fundamentals were sound throughout.
improvement_suggestions: Work on speed optimization while maintaining current technical quality
Consider more efficient instrument movements during knot tying phases
strengths: Excellent knot construction with proper surgeon's knot
